description_long: This house features a gable roof with reddish-brown shingles and a two-story section on one side, giving it a split-level appearance. The front facade includes a wooden door and two large rectangular windows with green trim, set above a stone or brick base. The side of the house reveals a covered carport or garage area, partially open, with a flat roof extension. The rear and opposite side are more plain, with minimal window openings and a continuous roofline. The exterior walls are finished in a light, off-white color, contrasting with the darker roof. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A light-colored, split-level house with a gable roof, large front windows, and a covered carport or garage extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, and the gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport or garage extension and a single window.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall and the full length of the gable roof visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the roof structure and overall footprint of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Single wooden door with no porch, flanked by large windows and a simple overhang.
